channel.title: Surfaced — Trending Products
channel.description: Consumer products worth knowing about — updated daily.

item.title: ProdShort
item.description: ProdShort transforms spoken content from your meetings into ready-to-post social media shorts and posts, addressing the challenge of creating authentic and time-consuming content. Unlike AI content generators that can sound fake, ProdShort captures the genuine value of your conversations, making them easily shareable. This is an ideal solution for founders, marketers, and teams looking to efficiently leverage their internal discussions for external communication and content marketing.

item.title: Littlebird
item.description: Littlebird is an AI assistant designed to understand and integrate with your existing work context, providing highly relevant assistance. It gains insight by observing your screen activity and transcribing meetings, allowing it to generate more accurate answers, drafts, and plans. This makes Littlebird a powerful tool for professionals who need an AI assistant that truly grasps their ongoing projects and workflow, enhancing productivity and reducing the need for constant context re-explanation.

item.title: Tobira.ai
item.description: Tobira.ai is a novel network where specialized AI agents operate on behalf of their human users to discover and negotiate business deals. Each AI agent is assigned a public address within the network, allowing it to autonomously find potential founders, investors, partners, and clients by interacting with other agents. Users maintain full control over their agent's actions and negotiations, making it a secure and efficient tool for proactive business development.

item.title: Stitch 2.0 by Google
item.description: Stitch 2.0 is an AI-powered design partner from Google that streamlines UI creation. It enables designers to generate high-fidelity, production-ready user interfaces rapidly using natural language prompts, voice commands, and context-aware AI agents. Stitch is designed for teams that need to iterate quickly on visual designs, bridging the gap between concept and code, and is perfect for product teams and UI/UX designers looking for an accelerated workflow.

item.title: Brila
item.description: Brila is a unique website generator that transforms your existing Google Maps reviews into compelling one-page websites. Instead of generic templates, Brila analyzes customer feedback to automatically populate your site with authentic testimonials and highlight what makes your business stand out. This service is ideal for small businesses or service providers looking for a quick, authentic, and effective online presence without the hassle of manual copywriting.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring
item.description: Samsung's first smart ring designed to track health and wellness metrics discreetly. Monitor sleep, heart rate, and activity levels with a minimalist and comfortable wearable.

item.title: Apple Vision Pro
item.description: Apple's groundbreaking spatial computing device that seamlessly blends digital content with the physical world. Experience immersive entertainment, productivity, and communication in a completely new way.

item.title: Google Pixel Watch 3
item.description: The latest generation of Google's smartwatch, featuring advanced health tracking, seamless integration with Wear OS and Fitbit, and a refined design. It aims to offer a comprehensive and stylish wearable experience.

item.title: Meta Quest 3
item.description: The latest virtual and mixed reality headset from Meta, offering improved performance, higher resolution displays, and enhanced passthrough capabilities for blending the virtual and physical worlds. It's designed for gaming, social experiences, and productivity.

item.title: Humane AI Pin
item.description: A screenless, wearable AI device that projects information onto your hand and uses voice commands for most interactions. It aims to be a more natural and less intrusive way to access technology.

item.title: Devialet Mania
item.description: Immerse yourself in unparalleled sound with the Devialet Mania portable speaker. Its active speaker system delivers 360-degree audio, adapting to your environment for an optimized listening experience. Enjoy high-fidelity sound on the go with its long-lasting battery.

item.title: Levoit Aura Smart Humidifier
item.description: Experience ultimate comfort with the Levoit Aura Smart Humidifier. This device intelligently monitors and adjusts humidity levels, ensuring optimal air quality for your home. Its whisper-quiet operation and sleek design make it a seamless addition to any room.

item.title: Lightform Projector
item.description: This isn't your average projector; Lightform creates interactive, touch-responsive holographic projections. It blurs the lines between digital content and the physical world.

item.title: Humble, Bunch Coffee Subscription
item.description: A new coffee subscription service that focuses on ethically sourced, high-quality beans from independent roasters around the world. Each box is curated to introduce you to unique flavor profiles.

item.title: Playdate
item.description: The Playdate is a unique, yellow handheld gaming console with a crank. It's designed for indie games and offers a refreshingly different approach to portable play.

item.title: Dodow Sleep Aid Device
item.description: Dodow is a metronome with a light system that teaches you how to fall asleep naturally. By synchronizing your breath with a gentle blue light projection on your ceiling, it gradually slows your breathing rate, helping you relax and drift off to sleep faster.

item.title: BioLite HeadLamp 800 Pro
item.description: The BioLite HeadLamp 800 Pro is an ultra-bright, rechargeable headlamp designed for serious outdoor enthusiasts. It delivers a powerful 800 lumens of light with a comfortable, no-bounce fit and an integrated pass-through charging system for extended use.

item.title: SodaStream Art Sparkling Water Maker
item.description: Transform ordinary tap water into refreshing sparkling water with the SodaStream Art. This sleek, retro-inspired machine features a unique carbonating lever for a personalized fizz experience, bringing cafe-style drinks right to your countertop.

item.title: Therabody SmartGoggles
item.description: These innovative smart goggles are designed to provide natural relief for eye strain, headaches, and facial tension using a combination of heat, vibration, and massage. They guide you through focused relaxation routines to improve sleep and reduce stress.

item.title: Garmin Instinct 2 Solar Smartwatch
item.description: A rugged GPS smartwatch built for the outdoors, featuring unlimited battery life in smartwatch mode with sufficient solar exposure. It offers advanced fitness tracking, navigation, heart rate monitoring, and smart notifications.

item.title: Jackery Explorer 300 Portable Power Station
item.description: The Jackery Explorer 300 is a compact and lightweight portable power station, perfect for camping, road trips, or as an emergency backup. It features multiple output ports, including AC, DC, USB-A, and USB-C PD, allowing you to charge and power a wide range of electronics and small appliances. Its 293Wh capacity can be recharged via wall outlet, car charger, or optional solar panels.

item.title: Philips SmartSleep Wake-up Light
item.description: This innovative wake-up light simulates a natural sunrise, gradually brightening your room over a set period to gently rouse you from sleep. It also includes a sunset simulation for winding down, personalized soundscapes, and smart features like ambient light sensors and a charging port. Designed to improve sleep and wakefulness cycles.

item.title: SureFlap Microchip Pet Door Connect
item.description: This advanced pet door uses your pet's microchip (or an RFID collar tag) to grant access, keeping unwanted animals out of your home. The Connect version links to a smartphone app, allowing you to monitor your pet's comings and goings and control the door remotely. It offers enhanced security and peace of mind for pet owners.

item.title: Anova Culinary Precision Cooker Nano
item.description: This compact sous vide immersion circulator brings restaurant-quality cooking to your home kitchen. It precisely heats and circulates water to cook food to exact doneness, ensuring perfect results every time.

item.title: Garmin InReach Mini 2
item.description: A compact, lightweight satellite communicator that enables two-way messaging, location tracking, and SOS capabilities even when outside cellular range. It provides peace of mind for adventurers by connecting them to global satellite networks.

item.title: WHOOP 4.0 Recovery Tracker
item.description: WHOOP 4.0 is a screenless fitness and health tracker focused on recovery, sleep, and strain. It continuously monitors physiological metrics to provide personalized insights into your body's readiness for activity.

item.title: DJI Mini 3 Pro Drone
item.description: The DJI Mini 3 Pro is an ultra-compact and powerful drone, perfect for capturing stunning aerial photos and 4K HDR videos. Weighing under 249g, it's designed for portability and features advanced safety and intelligent flight modes.

item.title: Ember Mug 2
item.description: The Ember Mug 2 is a smart heated mug that keeps your coffee or tea at your preferred drinking temperature for hours. Controlled via a smartphone app, it ensures every sip is just right from start to finish.

item.title: Garmin Fenix 7 Pro Sapphire Solar GPS Smartwatch
item.description: The Garmin Fenix 7 Pro Sapphire Solar is a premium multisport GPS watch designed for ultimate performance and endurance. It features a solar-charging lens, built-in LED flashlight, advanced training metrics, and comprehensive health monitoring, all in a rugged design.

item.title: Ring Video Doorbell Pro 2
item.description: The Ring Video Doorbell Pro 2 offers advanced features like 3D Motion Detection, Birds Eye View, and 1536p HD+ video with a head-to-toe field of view. It provides real-time alerts and two-way talk, enhancing home security and convenience.

item.title: Vitamix Ascent Series A3500 Smart Blender
item.description: The Vitamix A3500 is a top-of-the-line smart blender, offering five program settings for smoothies, hot soups, dips & spreads, frozen desserts, and self-cleaning. It features a touchscreen display and Bluetooth connectivity to pair with the Vitamix Perfect Blend App for additional programs and recipes.

item.title: Sea to Summit Aeros Premium Pillow
item.description: The Sea to Summit Aeros Premium Pillow is an ultralight and compact inflatable pillow designed for comfort during camping, backpacking, and travel. It features a soft brushed 50D polyester knit exterior for a luxurious feel and a multi-function valve for easy inflation and adjustment.

item.title: Ooni Karu 16 Multi-Fuel Pizza Oven
item.description: The Ooni Karu 16 is a versatile outdoor pizza oven capable of reaching 950°F (500°C) in just 15 minutes, allowing you to cook authentic Neapolitan-style pizza in 60 seconds. It offers the flexibility of using wood, charcoal, or an optional gas burner for fuel.

item.title: Gardyn Home Kit 3.0
item.description: The Gardyn Home Kit 3.0 is an AI-powered vertical hydroponic system that allows you to grow up to 30 plants indoors year-round. It features an intelligent app that monitors your plants' health and provides tailored care recommendations, making indoor gardening effortless.

item.title: Nebula Capsule 3 Laser Portable Projector
item.description: This mini laser projector delivers a bright, sharp 1080p image with integrated Android TV and powerful speakers, all packed into a soda-can sized design. It's perfect for backyard movie nights, camping, or on-the-go presentations.

item.title: Wynd Plus Personal Air Purifier
item.description: This portable air purifier creates a clean air 'bubble' around you, filtering out allergens, germs, and pollution from your personal space. It's compact enough for travel and features an integrated air quality sensor for real-time monitoring.

item.title: ECOVACS WINBOT W2 OMNI Robotic Window Cleaner
item.description: This advanced robotic window cleaner features multi-directional spray, automatic return to base, and intelligent path planning for sparkling clean windows. It handles various window types and frames, making window cleaning effortless and safe.

item.title: Insta360 GO 3 Action Camera
item.description: The Insta360 GO 3 is a tiny, magnetic action camera capable of capturing high-quality video from unique perspectives, featuring FlowState stabilization and a versatile Action Pod for remote control and charging. It's designed for grab-and-go filming in any scenario.

item.title: Muse S (Gen 2) Brain Sensing Headband
item.description: The Muse S is a multi-sensor meditation and sleep tracking headband that provides real-time feedback on your brain activity, heart rate, breathing, and body movements. It helps guide you into a meditative state and monitors your sleep stages for better rest.

item.title: Lomi Smart Composter
item.description: The Lomi Smart Composter transforms food scraps and approved bioplastics into nutrient-rich dirt in hours, reducing waste and creating valuable compost for your garden. It's a sleek, countertop appliance that significantly cuts down on kitchen waste.

item.title: Foreo Luna 4 Facial Cleansing Brush
item.description: An advanced sonic facial cleansing brush designed for all skin types, featuring soft silicone bristles and personalized routines via a smart app. It deeply cleanses, exfoliates, and massages the skin.

item.title: Smeg 50s Retro Style Toaster
item.description: A stylish and functional 2 or 4-slice toaster featuring iconic 1950s retro aesthetics. It combines classic design with modern toasting functions for perfect results every time.

item.title: BioLite FirePit+
item.description: A portable wood and charcoal burning fire pit that uses patented airflow technology to reduce smoke and enhance flame efficiency. It offers a unique design that allows for both ambient fire and grilling functionality.

item.title: Withings Body Comp Smart Scale
item.description: An advanced smart scale that provides comprehensive body composition analysis, including weight, muscle mass, and body fat, along with cardiovascular health metrics. It syncs seamlessly with the Withings Health Mate app for tracking progress.

item.title: Litter-Robot 4
item.description: A revolutionary self-cleaning litter box designed for multiple cats, reducing odor and scooping frequency. It automatically separates waste into an enclosed drawer, ensuring a fresh bed of litter for each use.

item.title: Rumpl Original Puffy Blanket
item.description: The Rumpl Original Puffy Blanket is a versatile, weather-resistant blanket designed for both indoor comfort and outdoor adventures. Made with durable ripstop polyester and synthetic insulation, it offers warmth, packability, and a unique aesthetic inspired by sleeping bags. It's a go-to for camping, picnics, beach trips, or just cozying up on the couch.

item.title: Nespresso Aeroccino 4 Milk Frother
item.description: The Nespresso Aeroccino 4 is a sleek, automatic milk frother designed to create hot milk, hot foam, cold foam, and hot milk with light foam for various coffee recipes. With a single whisk and two maximum fill levels, it's easy to use and clean, making barista-quality beverages accessible at home. It's an essential accessory for any coffee lover's kitchen.

item.title: SwitchBot Curtain 3
item.description: The SwitchBot Curtain 3 is a smart device designed to automate your existing curtains, making them smart in seconds. It attaches easily to your curtain rod or rail and can be controlled via smartphone, voice commands, or scheduled timers. This gadget brings convenience and energy efficiency to any home by allowing remote control over natural light.

item.title: FoodSaver VS3180 Multi-Use Food Preservation System
item.description: This vacuum sealing system keeps food fresh up to 5 times longer than traditional methods, preventing freezer burn and reducing food waste. It features multiple modes for dry and moist food, a built-in bag cutter, and a handheld sealer for canisters and zipper bags.

item.title: ENO (Eagle Nest Outfitters) DoubleNest Hammock
item.description: The ENO DoubleNest is a versatile and compact hammock designed for two people, perfect for camping, backpacking, or backyard relaxation. Made from durable, breathable nylon, it packs down into an integrated stuff sack for easy portability.
